details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 2-hour personal care visit on Saturday morning near 10001
Task 2: Request recurring Spanish-speaking high-rated caregiver (Mon/Thu evenings)
Task 3: Select cheapest monthly plan under $600 with meds & transportation
Task 4: Request earliest available morning in-home assessment for a parent
Task 5: Login to portal and pay $150 invoice with saved Visa 4242
Task 6: Create weekly schedule with three 2-hour blocks and submit request
Task 7: Save two high-rated, affordable caregivers to favorites for next Wednesday afternoon
Task 8: Find fall prevention article and save to My resources
Task 9: Store after-hours emergency phone number in profile
